name: morpheme_meaning_mvp
description: Minimal corpus and deterministic inference harness for morpheme/root/meaning feature inference and utterance routing.
caveats: This is a constructed smoke corpus, not evidence that the full MELM meaning graph generalizes.
Sound-symbolism is intentionally absent from the active gate until it has a stronger research basis.
Next validation needs generated held-out data, adversarial near-miss forms, and usage-based correction cases.
